=== Mauricio Montes ===

I received my B.S. in Mathematics from the University of Texas at Austin in 2021 (Hook ’em) and am currently a fifth-year Ph.D. student in Mathematics at Auburn University.

I am currently based in Paris, where I am visiting Sorbonne Université through May 2026 and working with [[https://www.normalesup.org/~sergeant/|Grégoire Sergeant-Perthuis]] on questions at the intersection of chemical reaction networks, probabilistic graphical models, and geometry.

My research lies broadly in applied and algebraic topology, category theory, probability, and algebraic geometry, with a current emphasis on chemical reaction networks and related structures arising in inference and dynamics.

You can read more about my [[Research|research here]].

I also help organize the [[DRP at Auburn|Directed Reading Program at Auburn]].

{{IMG20240622132513.jpg|Photo of Mauricio Montes|style="width:800px;height:533px;"}}

$\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} \frac{\cos(x)}{1+x^2}\,dx = \frac{\pi}{e}$
